task.title: Task
task.closeAndStart: Close task and start a new one
task.delete: Delete Task (Shift + Click to skip confirmation)
task.shareWithOrganizationDescription: Only members of your organization can access
task.sharePubliclyDescription: Anyone with the link can access
task.connectToCloudDescription: Sign in to Shofer Cloud to share tasks

fileChanges.diffUnavailable: Original content not available for this file.
fileChanges.revertConfirmUserEdits: {{path}} appears to have been modified outside of Shofer. Reverting will discard those changes. Continue?
fileChanges.revertAllConfirm: Revert ALL files Shofer edited in this task back to their state at task start? This cannot be undone.
fileChanges.blockedTaskRunning: Cannot modify files while Shofer is running. Pause or cancel the task first.

enqueueMessage: Add message to queue (will be sent after current task completes)

supportLinks.message: Enjoying Shofer? Show some love and help it grow:

onboarding: What would you like to do?
lockApiConfigAcrossModes: Lock API configuration across all modes in this workspace
unlockApiConfigAcrossModes: API configuration is locked across all modes in this workspace (click to unlock)

modeSelector.title: Modes
modeSelector.description: Specialized personas that tailor Shofer's behavior.

enhancePromptDescription: The 'Enhance Prompt' button helps improve your prompt by providing additional context, clarification, or rephrasing. Try typing a prompt in here and clicking the button again to see how it works.
imagesNotSupportedByModel: The selected model doesn't support images
imagesRejectedNotSupported: Image not added — the selected model doesn't support images
imagesRejectedMaxReached: Image not added — maximum {{count}} images per message reached
dragFiles: drag files to add to context
dragFilesImages: drag files/images to add to context

errorMessage.400: The provider couldn't process the request as made. Stop the task and try a different approach.
errorMessage.401: Couldn't authenticate with provider. Please check your API key configuration.
errorMessage.402: You seem to have run out of funds/credits in your account. Go to your provider and add more to continue.
errorMessage.403: Unauthorized. Your API key is valid, but the provider refused to complete this request.
errorMessage.429: Too many requests. You're being rate-limited by the provider. Please wait a bit before your next API call.
errorMessage.500: Provider server error. Something is wrong on the provider side, there's nothing wrong with your request.
errorMessage.connection: Connection error. Make sure you have a working internet connection.
errorMessage.unknown: Unknown API error. Please contact Shofer support.
errorMessage.claudeCodeNotAuthenticated: You need to sign in to use Claude Code. Go to Settings and click "Sign in to Claude Code" to authenticate.

checkpoint.initializingWarning: Still initializing checkpoint... If this takes too long, you can disable checkpoints in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink> and restart your task.

menu.restoreFilesDescription: Restores your project's files back to a snapshot taken at this point.
menu.restoreFilesAndTaskDescription: Restores your project's files back to a snapshot taken at this point and deletes all messages after this point.

truncation.title: Context Truncated
truncation.description: Older messages were removed from the conversation to stay within the context window limit. This is a fast but less context-preserving approach compared to condensation.

skills.wantsToLoad: Shofer wants to load a skill

fileOperations.wantsToRead: Shofer wants to read this file
fileOperations.wantsToReadMultiple: Shofer wants to read multiple files
fileOperations.wantsToReadAndXMore: Shofer wants to read this file and {{count}} more
fileOperations.wantsToReadOutsideWorkspace: Shofer wants to read this file outside of the workspace
fileOperations.wantsToEdit: Shofer wants to edit this file
fileOperations.wantsToEditOutsideWorkspace: Shofer wants to edit this file outside of the workspace
fileOperations.wantsToEditProtected: Shofer wants to edit a protected configuration file
fileOperations.wantsToApplyBatchChanges: Shofer wants to apply changes to multiple files
fileOperations.wantsToGenerateImage: Shofer wants to generate an image
fileOperations.wantsToGenerateImageOutsideWorkspace: Shofer wants to generate an image outside of the workspace
fileOperations.wantsToGenerateImageProtected: Shofer wants to generate an image in a protected location
fileOperations.wantsToCreate: Shofer wants to create a new file
fileOperations.wantsToInsert: Shofer wants to insert content into this file
fileOperations.wantsToInsertWithLineNumber: Shofer wants to insert content into this file at line {{lineNumber}}
fileOperations.wantsToInsertAtEnd: Shofer wants to append content to the end of this file

directoryOperations.wantsToViewTopLevel: Shofer wants to list the top level files in this directory
directoryOperations.didViewTopLevel: Shofer listed the top level files in this directory
directoryOperations.wantsToViewTopLevelOutsideWorkspace: Shofer wants to list the top level files in this directory (outside workspace)
directoryOperations.didViewTopLevelOutsideWorkspace: Shofer listed the top level files in this directory (outside workspace)
directoryOperations.wantsToViewRecursive: Shofer wants to recursively list all files in this directory
directoryOperations.didViewRecursive: Shofer recursively listed all files in this directory
directoryOperations.wantsToViewRecursiveOutsideWorkspace: Shofer wants to recursively list all files in this directory (outside workspace)
directoryOperations.didViewRecursiveOutsideWorkspace: Shofer recursively listed all files in this directory (outside workspace)
directoryOperations.wantsToViewMultipleDirectories: Shofer wants to list multiple directories
directoryOperations.wantsToSearch: Shofer wants to search this directory for {{regex}}
directoryOperations.wantsToSearchOutsideWorkspace: Shofer wants to search this directory (outside workspace) for {{regex}}
directoryOperations.didSearchOutsideWorkspace: Shofer searched this directory (outside workspace) for {{regex}}

ragSearch.wantsToSearch: Shofer wants to search the codebase for {{query}}
ragSearch.wantsToSearchWithPath: Shofer wants to search the codebase for {{query}} in {{path}}

gitSearch.wantsToSearch: Shofer wants to search git history for {{query}}

mcp.wantsToUseTool: Shofer wants to use a tool on the {{serverName}} MCP server
mcp.wantsToAccessResource: Shofer wants to access a resource on the {{serverName}} MCP server
mcp.wantsToUseExternalTool: Shofer wants to use the {{toolName}} tool from {{serverName}}

modes.wantsToSwitch: Shofer wants to switch to {{mode}} mode
modes.wantsToSwitchWithReason: Shofer wants to switch to {{mode}} mode because: {{reason}}

subtasks.wantsToCreate: Shofer wants to create a new subtask in {{mode}} mode
subtasks.wantsToFinish: Shofer wants to mark this as completed
subtasks.defaultResult: Please continue to the next task.
subtasks.completionInstructions: You can review the results and suggest any corrections or next steps. If everything looks good, confirm to return the result to the parent task.

backgroundTasks.waitForTask: Shofer is waiting for background task
backgroundTasks.waitForTaskWithTimeout: Shofer is waiting for background task (timeout {{timeout}}s)
backgroundTasks.checkTaskStatus: Shofer is checking the status of background task

modelResponseErrors.noToolsUsed: The model failed to use any tools in its response. This typically happens when the model provides only text/reasoning without calling the required tools to complete the task.
modelResponseErrors.noToolsUsedDetails: The model provided text/reasoning but did not call any of the required tools. This usually indicates the model misunderstood the task or is having difficulty determining which tool to use. The model has been automatically prompted to retry with proper tool usage.
modelResponseErrors.noAssistantMessages: The model did not provide any response content. This may indicate an issue with the API or the model's output.
modelResponseErrors.noAssistantMessagesDetails: The language model returned an empty response without any text or tool calls. This can happen due to API issues, rate limiting, or model-specific problems. The model has been automatically prompted to retry.

errorDetails.title: Error Details
errorDetails.proxyProvider: You seem to be using a proxy-based provider. Make sure to check its logs and to ensure it's not rewriting Shofer's requests.

powershell.issues: It seems like you're having Windows PowerShell issues, please see this

autoApprove.title: Auto-approve
autoApprove.description: Run these actions without asking for permission. Only enable for actions you fully trust.
autoApprove.selectOptionsFirst: Select at least one option below to enable auto-approval

announcement.title: Shofer {{version}} Released
announcement.support: Please support Shofer by starring us on <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>.

release.heading: What's New:
release.gpt54: Poe Provider: Added Poe as an AI provider so you can access Poe models directly in Shofer.
release.slashSkills: xAI and MiniMax Improvements: Migrated the xAI provider to the Responses API, added Grok-4.20 defaults, and fixed MiniMax model listings and context window handling for a more reliable setup.

announcement.noChangelog: Release notes are unavailable for this build.

followUpSuggest.copyToInput: Copy to input (same as shift + click)

profileViolationWarning: The current profile isn't compatible with your organization's settings

shellIntegration.title: Command Execution Warning
shellIntegration.description: Your command is being executed without VSCode terminal shell integration. To suppress this warning you can disable shell integration in the Terminal section of the Shofer settings or troubleshoot VSCode terminal integration using the link below.
shellIntegration.troubleshooting: Click here for shell integration documentation.

autoApprovedRequestLimitReached.title: Auto-Approved Request Limit Reached
autoApprovedRequestLimitReached.description: Shofer has reached the auto-approved limit of {{count}} API request(s). Would you like to reset the count and proceed with the task?

autoApprovedCostLimitReached.title: Auto-Approved Cost Limit Reached
autoApprovedCostLimitReached.description: Shofer has reached the auto-approved cost limit of ${{count}}. Would you like to reset the cost and proceed with the task?

versionIndicator.ariaLabel: Version {{version}} - Click to view release notes

slashCommands.title: Slash Commands
slashCommands.description: Use built-in slash commands or create custom ones for quick access to frequently used prompts and workflows. <DocsLink>Docs</DocsLink>

deleteDialog.title: Delete Command
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the command "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

slashCommand.wantsToRun: Shofer wants to run a slash command

queuedMessages.title: Queued Messages
queuedMessages.forceSend: Cancel current operation and send now

tooManyTools.title: Too many tools enabled
tooManyTools.messageTemplate: You have {{tools}} enabled via {{servers}}. Such a high number can confuse the model and lead to errors. Try to keep it below {{threshold}}.

askAssistantAgent.wantsToAsk: Shofer wants to ask the Assistant Agent

retiredProvider.title: Provider no longer supported
retiredProvider.message: Sorry, this provider is no longer supported. We saw very few Shofer users actually using it and we need to reduce the surface area of our codebase so we can keep shipping fast and serving our community well in this space. It was a really hard decision but it lets us focus on what matters most to you. It sucks, we know.
